item.title: Rob Riggle on Confidence in the Marines
item.description: Actor and Marine Corps veteran Rob Riggle reflects on how military service helped shape his confidence and perspective.

media:content.media:title: Rob Riggle on Confidence in the Marines
media:content.media:description: Actor and Marine Corps veteran Rob Riggle reflects on how military service helped shape his confidence and perspective.

item.title: The Real Top Gun: Maverick F-18 Pilot
item.description: A look at the real F-18 pilot behind Top Gun: Maverick, highlighting military aviation service and the story behind the film.

media:content.media:title: The Real Top Gun: Maverick F-18 Pilot
media:content.media:description: A look at the real F-18 pilot behind Top Gun: Maverick, highlighting military aviation service and the story behind the film.

item.title: WWII Pilot PJ Dahl on Flying the P-38
item.description: WWII pilot PJ Dahl reflects on flying the P-38 Lightning and his confidence as an ace in combat.

media:content.media:title: WWII Pilot PJ Dahl on Flying the P-38
media:content.media:description: WWII pilot PJ Dahl reflects on flying the P-38 Lightning and his confidence as an ace in combat.

item.title: Liberating Nazi Concentration Camps
item.description: Veterans reflect on what they saw while liberating Nazi concentration camps, offering a firsthand historical account of service, survival, and remembrance.

media:content.media:title: Liberating Nazi Concentration Camps
media:content.media:description: Veterans reflect on what they saw while liberating Nazi concentration camps, offering a firsthand historical account of service, survival, and remembrance.

item.title: Apollo 11: A Mission That Changed History
item.description: Apollo 11 lifted off 57 years ago, carrying the courage and ingenuity of a nation. Its Moon landing reflected the work and sacrifice of countless Americans.

media:content.media:title: Apollo 11: A Mission That Changed History
media:content.media:description: Apollo 11 lifted off 57 years ago, carrying the courage and ingenuity of a nation. Its Moon landing reflected the work and sacrifice of countless Americans.

item.title: James Madio and the Making of Band of Brothers
item.description: Actor James Madio reflects on the making of Band of Brothers and the WWII story behind the series.

media:content.media:title: James Madio and the Making of Band of Brothers
media:content.media:description: Actor James Madio reflects on the making of Band of Brothers and the WWII story behind the series.

item.title: They Trained for Everything, But This Was Different
item.description: A reflective military history piece on veterans facing an experience that tested training, judgment, and resilience in a new way.

media:content.media:title: They Trained for Everything, But This Was Different
media:content.media:description: A reflective military history piece on veterans facing an experience that tested training, judgment, and resilience in a new way.

item.title: Robert White and a Nazi Labor Camp
item.description: Robert White recalls entering a Nazi forced labor camp near Essen, Germany, and finding survivors whose suffering stayed with him for life.

media:content.media:title: Robert White and a Nazi Labor Camp
media:content.media:description: Robert White recalls entering a Nazi forced labor camp near Essen, Germany, and finding survivors whose suffering stayed with him for life.

item.title: Remembering the Sacrifices at Bloody Nose Ridge
item.description: A reflective look at the sacrifices made on Bloody Nose Ridge, honoring the service and courage remembered in this historical account.

media:content.media:title: Remembering the Sacrifices at Bloody Nose Ridge
media:content.media:description: A reflective look at the sacrifices made on Bloody Nose Ridge, honoring the service and courage remembered in this historical account.

item.title: John Allen’s Path to the Navy SEALs
item.description: A brief look at the journey that shaped John Allen into a Navy SEAL, reflecting on service, training, and commitment.

media:content.media:description: A brief look at the journey that shaped John Allen into a Navy SEAL, reflecting on service, training, and commitment.

item.title: Why U.S. Troops Rode Horses in Afghanistan
item.description: A look at why U.S. troops rode horses into battle in Afghanistan, drawing on firsthand military experience and the realities of the terrain.

media:content.media:title: Why U.S. Troops Rode Horses in Afghanistan
media:content.media:description: A look at why U.S. troops rode horses into battle in Afghanistan, drawing on firsthand military experience and the realities of the terrain.
